message:
chore(deps): refresh Cargo.lock after asupersync v0.2.0 dependency bump

Regenerates the lockfile to reflect the asupersync version update from
v0.1.1 to v0.2.0 performed by concurrent agent work. No source code
changes — lockfile only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
